title: 151 10057 SEALANT, Black,1 - Pack
features: WATERPROOF, QUICK & EASY REPAIRS: 151 Roof & Gutter Sealant, suitable for use on all exterior exposed surfaces, creates a permanent watertight barrier.
DIY CARTRIDGE: 151 Roof & Gutter Selant, a black acrylic filler, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use Roof & Gutter Sealant. Colour: Black. Store at room temperature.
